Failure to resolve these invalidates the draft.","R1.3":"The 'supervision-free' performance attribution in the results is flatly contradicted by the supervised training objective stated three paragraphs earlier; the evidence-claim link is broken and must be repaired or the claim retracted.","R1.6":"'Improve this draft' centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality; writing polish is a standard, expected component of draft improvement."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the improvement address substantive logical content—including resolving internal contradictions such as 'end-to-end single forward pass' vs. the described sequential pipeline and 'supervision-free' vs. explicit supervised training on AmbigNQ—or is the scope limited to surface-level writing polish only?"}

rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim ('first end-to-end model', 'single forward pass') is in direct tension with the described multi-component sequential pipeline; any meaningful improvement must reconcile or reframe the central thesis.
rationale.R1.2: The draft contains two load-bearing logical contradictions: (1) the abstract asserts a single seq2seq backbone performing all steps in one forward pass, while the method section describes three separately trained components combined only at inference; (2) the results section attributes gains to a 'supervision-free approach' in which the model 'never sees gold AmbigNQ disambiguations,' while the training section explicitly supervises the rewriter on AmbigNQ disambiguated questions. Failure to resolve these invalidates the draft.
rationale.R1.3: The 'supervision-free' performance attribution in the results is flatly contradicted by the supervised training objective stated three paragraphs earlier; the evidence-claim link is broken and must be repaired or the claim retracted.
rationale.R1.6: 'Improve this draft' centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality; writing polish is a standard, expected component of draft improvement.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the improvement address substantive logical content—including resolving internal contradictions such as 'end-to-end single forward pass' vs. the described sequential pipeline and 'supervision-free' vs. explicit supervised training on AmbigNQ—or is the scope limited to surface-level writing polish only?
